title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: FCA warns of major shakeup as AI agents meet tokenized money
summary: The FCA’s vision for agentic AI points toward a financial system where programmable money and tokenized assets could play a much larger role.

title: Saudis Slash Main Oil Price to Rare Discount as Market Dives
summary: Saudi Arabia made big reductions to its main crude oil price for buyers in Asia, selling barrels at a discount for the first time since it embarked on a price war in 2020, as a surge of global supply heightens competition to find buyers.

title: Tech Stocks Rebound as Dip Buyers Pounce on Chip Pullback
summary: US stocks climbed on Monday as investors jumped on technology shares after the blistering artificial-intelligence trade wavered heading into the holiday weekend.

Russia's biggest bank, Sberbank, plans to launch a Bitcoin and crypto wallet plus digital asset custody by December as the country rolls out its new crypto framework.

title: Strive (ASST) Adds 17.76 Bitcoin as Falling Prices Boost Its Quarterly Yield

Strive (ASST) Adds 17.76 Bitcoin as Falling Prices Boost Its Quarterly Yield
Strive (ASST) added a symbolic 17.76 BTC, pushing its treasury to 19,882 bitcoin as a sharp quarterly accumulation spree delivered a 24% BTC yield.

title: Tom Lee’s BitMine Adds $73 Million in Ethereum While Strategy Dumps Bitcoin
summary: BitMine continued its relentless accumulation of Ethereum while Bitcoin's biggest treasury firm parted ways with more of its holdings.

title: Ethereum 'Reinventing Itself' With Biggest Overhaul Since the Merge: Vitalik Buterin
summary: Nearly every core piece of the protocol will be rebuilt over three to four years, with quantum safety and privacy moved front and center.

title: Bitmine’s Tom Lee ties ether strength to Clarity Act odds as treasury nears 5% of Ethereum’s total supply
summary: Bitmine acquired 42,197 ether worth an estimated $74 million last week, lifting its treasury to over 5.7 million ETH.

title: TeraWulf signs 20-year data center lease with Anthropic expected to generate $19 billion in revenue
summary: Anthropic will lease at TeraWulf's Justified Data site in Hawesville, Kentucky, which is expected to provide 401 MW of IT load.
